item.title: [Segurança] Progress Kemp LoadMaster Pre-Auth RCE Flaw Faces Active Exploitation Attempts
item.description:
🚨 Progress Kemp LoadMaster Pre-Auth RCE Flaw Faces Active Exploitation Attempts
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.6
Resumo:
A recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting Progress Kemp LoadMaster is seeing active exploitation attempts, according to an advisory from eSentire's Threat Response Unit (TRU). The Canadian cybersecurity company said it identified exploitation attempts targeting CVE-2026-8037 (CVSS score: 9.6), an operating system (OS) command injection flaw that could be exploited to achieve
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/latest-progress-kemp-loadmaster-pre.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] DirtyClone Linux kernel local privilege escalation vulnerability fixes available
item.description:
🚨 DirtyClone Linux kernel local privilege escalation vulnerability fixes available
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
On June 25, 2026, JFrog published their research into CVE-2026-43503, referring to the vulnerability as DirtyClone. The vulnerability had previously been responsibly disclosed to the Linux kernel maintainers and the CVE record published on May 23, 2026. The vulnerability affects multiple Linux distributions, including all Ubuntu releases. The first security updates for Ubuntu were released […]
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/dirtyclone-linux-vulnerability-fixes-available

item.title: [Segurança] Citrix Patches Six NetScaler Flaws Allowing File Read and Denial-of-Service
item.description:
🚨 Citrix Patches Six NetScaler Flaws Allowing File Read and Denial-of-Service
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Citrix on Tuesday released security updates to address multiple flaws in NetScaler ADC (formerly Citrix ADC) and NetScaler Gateway (formerly Citrix Gateway) that could be exploited by an attacker to facilitate arbitrary file reads or trigger a denial-of-service (DoS) condition. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-8451 (CVSS score: 8.8) - An insufficient input validation
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/citrix-patches-six-netscaler-flaws.html

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-56017 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-56017 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
JavaScript::Minifier::XS versions before 0.16 for Perl crash with a NULL pointer dereference when the first meaningful token of the input is a slash. The regexp versus division disambiguator in JsTokenizeString (XS.xs) inspects the previous token's last byte to choose between a regexp literal and a division operator. When a slash is the first meaningful token, with the start of input or only whitespace and comments b...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56017

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8488-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8488-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that some AMD processors did not properly clear data in the floating point divider unit during speculative execution. A local attacker could use this to expose sensitive information. (CVE-2025-54505) Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - ARM64 architecture;...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8488-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8487-1: curl vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8487-1: curl vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
Andrew Nesbitt discovered that curl could reuse an existing live connection during STARTTLS-based connection upgrades even when the TLS configuration did not match. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause curl to use an unintended TLS configuration. (CVE-2026-8286) Muhamad Arga Reksapati discovered that curl incorrectly reused connections for Negotiate-authenticated requests when different services w...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8487-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-27955 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-27955 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.6
Resumo:
Coolify is an open-source and self-hostable tool for managing servers, applications, and databases. Prior to 4.0.0-beta.464, the executeInDocker() helper wraps commands in bash -c '{$command}' without escaping single quotes. User-controlled docker_compose_custom_build_command and docker_compose_custom_start_command fields are interpolated directly, allowing a single quote to break out of the bash -c argument and exec...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27955

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-58446 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-58446 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
Presenton before 0.8.8-beta bundles an MCP server that, on server/Docker deployments configured with session authentication (AUTH_USERNAME/AUTH_PASSWORD), is reachable unauthenticated at /mcp because the nginx front-end does not apply the auth_request gate to that path and the MCP server auto-mints a valid internal session token for the configured user. A remote unauthenticated attacker can invoke MCP tools such as g...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-58446

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-12114 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-12114 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.4
Resumo:
The Team Members – Multi Language Supported Team Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via admin settings in all versions up to, and including, 8.7 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level permissions and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user ac...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12114

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-11906 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-11906 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 for Linux, UNIX and Windows (includes Db2 Connect Server) could allow an authenticated user to cause a denial of service due to improper neutralization of special elements in the data query logic of XMLTable-derived columns.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11906

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-36372 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-36372 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.5
Resumo:
IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 for Linux, UNIX and Windows (includes Db2 Connect Server) could disclose sensitive information to an authenticated user from the monitoring and event tables.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-36372

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Multiple Vulnerabilities in Google Chrome Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description:
📢 Multiple Vulnerabilities in Google Chrome Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a CIS Advisories, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Announcing the General Availability of Holodeck 9.1
item.description:
📰 Announcing the General Availability of Holodeck 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
We’re thrilled to announce the General Availability of Holodeck 9.1, a major release that brings significant new capabilities to your nested VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) toolkit! Today’s infrastructure teams face increasing pressure to validate new capabilities quickly, reliably, and at scale, without monopolizing precious production hardware. Holodeck has always been the answer to that challenge, …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/07/01/announcing-the-general-availability-of-holodeck-9-1/

item.title: [Segurança] AI-Generated Browser Ransomware Abuses Chromium API on Windows and Android
item.description:
📰 AI-Generated Browser Ransomware Abuses Chromium API on Windows and Android
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new malware artifact generated using DeepSeek that constructed a novel attack path combining "unrealistic browser-malware concepts with a real browser capability" to turn it into a working ransomware technique that runs entirely inside the browser on both Windows and Android devices. "This is the first documented case where a frontier AI model
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/ai-generated-browser-ransomware-abuses.html

item.title: [Segurança] Anthropic to restore Claude Fable access on Wednesday
item.description:
📰 Anthropic to restore Claude Fable access on Wednesday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Anthropic has confirmed that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude's two most powerful models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/artificial-intelligence/anthropic-to-restore-claude-fable-access-on-wednesday/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Simplifying Policy Management with Open Policy Agent Gatekeeper
item.description:
📰 Simplifying Policy Management with Open Policy Agent Gatekeeper
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
As enterprise Kubernetes adoption scales, platform teams face a fundamental challenge: how do you enforce consistent security and operational policies across dozens of clusters without turning into a bottleneck for developers? Many organizations rely on Open Policy Agent (OPA) Gatekeeper to build these guardrails. It provides a flexible policy framework that can be used to: …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/29/simplifying-policy-management-with-open-policy-agent-gatekeeper/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Community Highlights: Learn, Connect, and Grow with vExperts
item.description:

Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
As IT practitioners, we know that solving complex infrastructure challenges rarely happens in a vacuum. You need the right tools, the right training, and most importantly, the right peers. If you caught our previous blog on the Four Key Benefits of Attending, you know that VMware Explore 2026 in Las Vegas is designed to foster …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/explore/community-highlights/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Why AI Agents Need Isolation
item.description:
📰 Why AI Agents Need Isolation
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Learn why AI agent isolation matters, how Docker SBX enables safer AI workflows, and how Sandbox Kits help.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/why-ai-agents-need-isolation/
